sources.label: Yahoo Finance - Gurit Holding AG (GURN.SW) quote and news
Gurit - major long-term supply agreement with leading wind OEM (Jan 2026, pre-window)
Stockanalysis.com - Gurit Holding AG overview (next earnings Aug 26, 2026)

verdicts.rankRationale: No material news since June 6 and only a -1.5% drift today; yesterday's down move already penalized the +182% YTD rerating against a still-speculative AI-chain pathway, so no new information justifies moving again on this strict latent-node list.
verdicts.bull: Gurit's core-kit composites franchise is re-accelerating (CHF 250M wind OEM agreement, +25% core growth), and its lightweight structural materials expertise remains a credible optionality play for enclosures and advanced manufacturing cells if AI-infrastructure demand for composites materializes.
verdicts.neutral: The turnaround is real but entirely wind/marine-driven; the AI-node thesis remains a qualitative pathway with no disclosed AI-related contract, so the stock trades on its renewables recovery, not the latent-AI case.
verdicts.bear: After a +182% YTD rerating on a $0.2B micro-cap, residual alpha on the AI lens is thin; any wind-demand wobble or OEM volume cut hits hard, and the AI-chain link could simply never convert from 'could support' to revenue.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: H1 2026 results on Aug 26, 2026, or any first disclosed contract tying Gurit composites to data-center / AI-infrastructure structures.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Post-rerating give-back: a 182% YTD micro-cap run built on wind contracts unwinds quickly if OEM demand softens, with the AI thesis providing no fundamental floor.
